differentials.raw: Vasoconstriction (a)  ↑ in intrarenal pressure induced by hypertonicity (b)  intrarenal smooth muscle contraction ← hypertonic substances

context: =  transient decline of renal function Acute Renal Failure =  sudden + rapid deterioration of renal function =  increase in serum creatinine of > 25% or to > 2 mg/dL within 2 days of receiving contrast material Frequency:   1-30%; 3rd most common cause of in-hospital renal failure after hypotension and surgery Risk factors: Contrast agent-independent acute kidney injury is NOT significantly different and may be clinically indistinguishable when adjusted for patient risk factors. HOCM ◊  Diabetics with normal renal function are not at ↑ risk! CAVE: ◊  Small decreases in renal function may great
